prompt: A Japanese shrine pathway lined with blooming cherry blossom trees in full bloom. Pink and white petals drift through warm golden afternoon air. A large red torii gate frames the path ahead. Stone lanterns stand on both sides of the stone-paved walkway. The shrine building is partially visible through the blossoms in the background. To the left, a chozuya (hand-washing fountain) with a bamboo ladle sits beneath a small wooden roof. To the right, a row of ema (wooden prayer plaques) hangs on a wooden rack beside a red vending machine selling omamori charms. Behind the torii gate, stone komainu guardian lion statues flank the entrance to the shrine hall. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level looking straight down the shrine pathway toward the torii gate. No held objects.

tracking_object.desc: stone lantern on the left side of the path

A large red torii gate frames the path ahead. Stone lanterns stand on both sides of the stone-paved walkway. The shrine building is partially visible through the blossoms in the background.

To the right, a row of ema (wooden prayer plaques) hangs on a wooden rack beside a red vending machine selling omamori charms.
